title: Korak 10

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Quincy's Tips for Getting a Developer Job

Learning to code is hard, but as Quincy Larson says, You can become a developer.

Envisioning Success

Can you imagine what it would be like to be a successful developer? To have built software systems that people rely upon?

—Quincy Larson, How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book]
challengeFiles.seed:
Quincy's Tips for Getting a Developer Job

Learning to code is hard, but as Quincy Larson says, You can become a developer.

Envisioning Success

Can you imagine what it would be like to be a successful developer? To have built software systems that people rely upon?

—Quincy Larson, How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book]

tests.text: You should have a cite element inside the p element below the blockquote element.
Your cite element should have the text How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book].
tests.testString:
const citeEl = document.querySelector('blockquote + p > cite');
assert.equal(citeEl?.innerText.trim(), 'How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book]');

tests.text: Ignoring the cite element you just added, the text of the p element should still be —Quincy Larson, How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book].
tests.testString:
const pElCleanedText = document.querySelector('blockquote + p')?.innerText.trim().replaceAll(/ {2,}/g, ' ');
assert.equal(pElCleanedText, '—Quincy Larson, How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book]');

description:
Do sada koristite atribut cite za pripisivanje izvora citata, ali taj atribut zapravo ne prikazuje izvor korisniku.

Ako želite vizuelno pripisati izvor, možete dodati element citata, cite, van bloka citata. Element citata je HTML element koji možete koristiti za označavanje naslova referenciranog kreativnog dela, kao što su knjiga, članak, pesma, film, veb stranica ili naučni rad.

Evo primera:

<div>
  <blockquote cite="https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/is-college-worth-it/">
    The first thing you should consider about education is this is an economic decision.
  </blockquote>
  <p>—Quincy Larson, <cite>Is College Still Worth it? Tips from my 20 Years in Adult Education</cite></p>
</div>

Unutar elementa p ispod bloka citata, obavijte How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book] u elementu cite.
